summary: Doc-only triage. The user selected localization layout from the parked UI regression candidate list. Compared all-locale launch screenshots, representative locale launch-shell layout, reviewed-translation layout, pseudo/long-text layout, and manual/TestFlight app-language layout. Selected representative locale launch-shell layout because all-locale screenshot proof already exists, real translated-text layout is blocked until reviewed translations exist, and a small XCUITest batch can still guard locale launch arguments plus RTL/CJK shell stability without claiming translation quality. Decision memo added to docs/workflows/ui-regression-plan.md under '### Batch 7 decision'. Queued implementation slice owlory-ui-regression-batch-7-localization-layout-shell with explicit scope: en, de, ar, zh-Hans; fresh-day seed; locale launch args; stable identifiers; DOMAIN=localization.

contract_status_changes.contract: Next UI regression surface selection for localization layout (Batch 7)
contract_status_changes.before: Localization layout was a parked candidate. All-locale locale smoke and screenshot proof existed, but no maintained Lane 2 XCUITest regression was selected. Non-English resources remained English placeholders, so full translated-text layout proof was not honest.
contract_status_changes.after: Batch 7 surface explicitly selected: representative locale launch-shell regression for en, de, ar, and zh-Hans. The implementation slice is queued with the rule that it proves shell stability under locale launch arguments only, not translation quality or full layout correctness.

residual_risks: The implementation slice may need stable tab or shell accessibility identifiers if the current shell is label-only and therefore brittle once real translations land.
Representative locale shell regression does not prove all 19 locales in Lane 2; all-locale resource loading and launch-surface screenshots remain covered by the localization proof lanes.

The selected Batch 7 does not prove real translated-text layout because non-English resources are still English placeholders. Reviewed-translation layout remains blocked until reviewed values are ingested.
The previously queued Patterns implementation remains open but is now lower priority than the user-directed localization layout implementation.
recommended_next_reason: Queued behind this triage with explicit implementation scope and higher priority than the still-queued Patterns Batch 6 implementation because the user explicitly selected localization layout.
